betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Magnetohydrodynamic Turbines (MHDT)§f generate power directly from §bsuperheated plasma§f.

§eBenefit:§f
• §a+35% power efficiency§f compared to steam thermal methods
• Direct plasma-to-electricity conversion
• No mechanical parts

§eUsage:§f
• Attach to §bFusion Reactor§f vessel ports
• Requires own §bPerfluoromethyl§f coolant supply
• Subject to §bport sharing§f efficiency rules

§ePort Sharing:§f
Multiple MHDTs on same port reduces individual efficiency. Spread across different ports for maximum yield.

§aTip:§f MHDTs are the most efficient way to extract power from Fusion - use them over steam-based methods when possible.
